A Letter For You

Words from the deepest corner of my heart ✉

My Dearest Sakshi,

On this very special day, I want you to know something — you are one of the most extraordinary people I have ever had the privilege of knowing. The world is genuinely a brighter, kinder, and more beautiful place because of you.

Your presence in my life is a gift beyond measure. There is a deep, quiet comfort in simply knowing you are near, a feeling that I love with your whole existence. Your being here brings a profound sense of happiness to my heart; just having you by my side is enough to make everything feel beautiful and complete.

On your birthday, I wish you every beautiful thing your heart has ever desired. I wish you joy that makes your eyes crinkle, adventures that take your breath away, and love that feels as vast as the night sky. I wish you mornings filled with sunlight and evenings that feel like poetry.

You deserve all the good things life has to offer — and so much more. Today is your day, Sakshi Sharma, and I hope every single moment of it reminds you of how deeply you are appreciated and adored.

Happy Birthday, my favourite human. 🌸

With all the love in the universe,
Your Someone Special 💫
🌸 💕 ✨ 🌷 💫
Happy Birthday, Sakshi ✨
